name: Rasomadhuri (Fried Cheese Balls)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients and knead with the palm of your hand until smooth.
2. Make round balls (1 inch in diameter).
3. Heat oil in a deep pan and brown the cheese balls.
4. Drain them on paper towel.
5. Dip them in sugar syrup made by heating 1 cup sugar and 2 cups water. Simmer for 10 minutes before serving.
